key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often system metrics are read. A lower value means more up-to-date data and higher resource consumption.

key.name: show-sparkline
key.summary: Show CPU sparkline graph on panel

key.name: show-temperature
key.description: Will be active in Phase 3; automatically hidden if hardware is not supported.

key.name: show-process-list
key.summary: Show process list in dropdown menu
key.description: If disabled, top CPU/RAM consuming processes and stuck/zombie warnings are hidden; process scanning also stops completely (provides a small performance gain).

key.name: show-process-pid
key.summary: Show PID number in process rows
key.description: When disabled, only the process name and resource usage are displayed, and the PID number is hidden.

key.name: show-gpu
key.summary: Show GPU usage and temperature on panel
key.description: Read directly on AMD/Radeon/Nouveau drivers, and via nvidia-smi on NVIDIA if installed. Automatically hidden if hardware/driver is not supported.

key.name: show-network
key.description: Total instantaneous download and upload speed of all network interfaces (excluding loopback) via /proc/net/dev.
